entities.name: AVCD PROGRAM
entities.description: The Feed the Future Kenya - Accelerated Value Chain Development program designed to apply technologies and innovations to increase productivity

entities.name: TECHNOLOGIES AND INNOVATIONS
entities.description: Technical tools and novel approaches applied to agricultural value chains to improve efficiency and output

entities.name: VALUE CHAINS
entities.description: The full range of activities required to bring an agricultural product from production to delivery to final consumers

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The efficiency of production, specifically the increase in agricultural output per unit of input

entities.name: INCLUSIVE AGRICULTURAL GROWTH
entities.description: Agricultural economic expansion that ensures benefits are shared across different socio-economic groups

entities.name: NUTRITION
entities.description: The intake of food and nutrients necessary for health and growth

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: POVERTY
entities.description: The state of lacking sufficient financial resources to meet basic needs

entities.name: HUNGER
entities.description: The condition of suffering from a lack of food

entities.name: KENYA
entities.description: The East African country where the AVCD program is being implemented
